description: worker_crash checkpoint + "abar chalao": resume from 'step_3_of_5' with the blocker classified — never restart from zero.

transcript.text: Boss, worker প্রসেস মারা গেছে — checkpoint রেখেছি (step_3_of_5), বললে ওখান থেকেই চালাবো।

expected.outcome: Resumes at step_3_of_5; earlier verified steps are not repeated.
